page_content:
Corequisite: LARC330 or LARC642.

Restriction: Must be in Landscape Architecture program.

Credit Only Granted for. LARC321, LARC412 or LARC721.

Formerly: LARC321.

LARC413 Construction Technology III: Water Soil-Centric Practices (4 Credits)

Third of three courses in the landscape architecture engineering and construction sequence focuses on site construction, soil and water- centric Best Design Practices (BDPs). Included in this subject area are the topics of construction operations and earthwork, soil erosion and sediment control, retaining wall, soil and constructed media, shoreline construction, bioretention and planting systems and green roofs. Prerequisite: LARC41 2.
